author: @jessiebutterfield5216
comment: I just got the farmer's dog for my Pomsky. We are paying $232 for 56 days, or $132 for a month. This also includes a bag of treats for $11.99. The price is good. I also got a container and a cold bag for signing up. I like the food container; it has half and 1/4 markings, which make it easier for me to cut her portions. Now, on to the food: before, we were using Purina ProPlan, and she didn't really like it much. It would take her forever to eat it. I was doing some browsing and found the farmer's dog and the pets table. I decided to go with the farmer's dog for me; they are a little more expensive than the Pets Table, but after reading all the reviews and watching the videos on their website, I figured I would give them a try. It's been 2 weeks now, and Mila loves the food I give her once a day in the morning, and she eats it all. It doesn't take her all day to eat it. She used to go looking for more than the Purina; now she's good, and I like the directions they have on the packaging 75% of her kibble and some of the farmers' dog food come in smaller pouches with days 1 and 2, 3 and 4 on them, which is nice also like he said in the video it comes with her name on it they take the time to listen which shows they care. They also have a text line, and I figured they wouldn't answer on a Sunday. To my surprise, I got a text back that day because they forgot the container. They apologized and sent it right out to me. They have amazing customer service. I also messaged about pricing. After my first box, they were super friendly and didn't take days to answer. Sorry for the long text, trying to help some people out. Go with the farmer's dog, you won't regret it. I also am not getting paid or anything from the farmer's dog. Thanks for the video, I appreciate it, and hope my message helped people as well.
